## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:bundle` passes (no fonts in the browser entry, under the gzip ceiling)
- [ ] Output-affecting? Included a `cd mcp && npm run compare` before/after render
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CHANGELOG) if the public API or behavior changed
